prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年青海大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约12038名、11135名、11060名、15788名、12734名。2021–2023年位次在11000–12000名区间窄幅波动 ，2024年大幅后移至15788名（当年考生总数增至65969人），2025年因招生计划从10人缩至7人，位次显著前移至12734名，近两年波动幅度较大；该校在海南省 综合类招生计划：2021–2024年均为10人，2025年缩招至7人，2026年维持7人不变。2025年缩招30%是当年位次大幅前移的核心驱动因素；2026年计划与2025年 持平，无额外扩缩招影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学是国家211工程和双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年约第180–198名区间，属于中后段211院校，综合实力和品牌号召 力相对有限；该校在2021–2026年声誉舆情文件中无重大正面或负面事件记录，公众关注度较低；抖音学校热度排名第106位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量 偏低，未形成明显的报考热度助推效应；第五轮学科评估中青海大学无A-/A/A+等级学科，优势学科实力不突出，对高分考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在海南招生的计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化等专业属社会高热推荐方向，临床医学属推荐方向，金融学属分化观望方向，相关专业热度对报考有一定正向拉 动；海南省2026年普通高考考生总数约78000人（较2025年67408人增长约15.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧，无明显波动；青海大学位于青海省西宁市，距海南省较远，跨省就读的地域偏好较低；该校在海南招生规模极小（仅7人），本地无招生占比优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位 次基准12734名、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、海南省考生总数大幅增长约15.7%导致竞争加剧、学校层次和声誉热度偏弱等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移。 预测最低位次约12534名，区间12034–13034名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间12034–13034名内，建议以二档电气工程及其自动化、动物医学为主攻方向，一档计算机科学与技术可冲刺（参考2025年该专业最低位次7443名，远优于校线）， 三档临床医学和医学影像学作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如12000名以内）可重点冲刺一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 12038, 11135, 11060, 15788, and 12734 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 11000–12000 range. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift to 15788 (with the total number of candidates that year increasing to 65969). In 2025, due to the enrollment plan being reduced from 10 to 7 students, the ranking notably moved forward to 12734, showing considerable fluctuation in the past two years. The enrollment plan for Qinghai University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category: from 2021 to 2024, it was consistently 10 students; in 2025, it was reduced to 7 students; in 2026, it remains unchanged at 7 students. The 30% reduction in enrollment in 2025 was the core driving factor for the significant forward shift in rankings that year. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no additional expansion or contraction effects.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in recent years is approximately in the 180–198 range, placing it in the mid-to-late segment of 211 universities, with relatively limited overall strength and brand appeal. There are no records of major positive or negative events in the university's reputation and public opinion documents from 2021 to 2026, and public attention is low. The university's Douyin popularity ranking is 106th, with an evaluation of 'average', indicating low exposure on short video platforms and no significant boost in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no A-/A/A+ level disciplines, and its advantageous disciplines are not outstanding, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The majors recruited by the university in Hainan, such as Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, are among the highly popular recommended directions in society. Clinical Medicine is a recommended direction, while Finance is a direction with divided opinions. The popularity of related majors has a certain positive pull on applications. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Hainan Province is approximately 78000 (an increase of about 15.7% compared to 67408 in 2025), indicating a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition, with no obvious fluctuations. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, which is far from Hainan Province, resulting in lower geographical preference for cross-province study. The university's enrollment scale in Hainan is extremely small (only 7 students), with no local enrollment proportion advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 ranking baseline of 12734, the 2026 enrollment plan being the same as 2025, the significant increase of about 15.7% in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province leading to intensified competition, and the relatively weak school level and reputation popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12534, with a range of 12034–13034.

- Finance

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12034–13034, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Veterinary Medicine. Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology can be targeted as a stretch (referencing the 2025 minimum ranking of 7443 for this major, which is far better than the school line). Tier 3 majors such as Clinical Medicine and Medical Imaging can serve as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors.
